title: Keystone Lockfile
description: Per-install state record at harness/keystone.lock.json. Records the keystone binary version that last touched the install, agent IDs with menu files installed, and one entry per installed policy (source ref, resolved SHA, policy version, file hashes).

version.description: Lockfile schema version. Bumped when fields are renamed or removed.
Binary version that last touched the install.

agents.description: Agent IDs with menu files installed.

policies.description: Map of policy name → installed-policy record.

source_ref.description: Exact ref string the user passed (e.g. git+https://...#v1.0.0).

resolved_sha.description: Commit SHA or artifact digest the policy resolved to.

policy_version.description: Value from the policy manifest's version field.

files.description: Map of file path (relative to install dir, slash-separated) to content hash ('sha256:<hex>').
